013.name: 013 - Submission Intake - Create or Link Video Feedback

Conditions:
When
Ready for Video Feedback Ready? = 1

112.name: 112 - Video Review and XP - Create Video Feedback from Submission Asset
112.conditions:
Conditions:
When
Upload Destination is Video Feedback
and
Video Feedback is empty
and
Submission - Linked is not empty
and
Enrollment - Linked is not empty
and
Airtable Attachment is not empty

008.name: 008 - Submission Intake and Asset Creation - Mark Submission XP Award as Processing
